explanations.12: The ?? operator means 'use the value on the left if it exists, otherwise use the value on the right as a fallback'.
explanations.18: This long string uses string interpolation (the $ prefix) to insert variables into an Oracle connection string, which tells the database where to find the server and how to log in.
explanations.26: ROWNUM <= 25 is an Oracle-specific way to limit results to the first 25 rows (similar to LIMIT in other databases).
explanations.28: The nested using statements ensure that both the command and reader objects are properly cleaned up when done, even if an error occurs.
